name: overnight-improve
description: Research dossier, bug hunt, test expansion, security hardening, ship report
goals: Fix critical bugs found in audit
Expand bot and watcher test coverage
Harden verify and admin security paths
Ship with full verify suite green

requirements.description: Produce research dossier using parallel explore subagents: architecture, untested modules, top 5 improvements

test.description: Add tests/test_overnight_research.py asserting research.md structure and candidate count

implement.description: Launch parallel explore subagents; consolidate into research.md

requirements.description: Deep bug hunt on recent commits; document findings and fix any critical issues with tests

test.description: Extend test_overnight_research.py to assert audit.md has severity sections

implement.description: Run deep-bug-hunt skill; write audit.md; minimal fixes with tests if critical

requirements.description: Add unit tests for singulr/bot/handlers.py join and verification decision paths

test.description: Add tests/test_bot_handlers.py with mocked telegram Application

implement.description: Implement tests using telegram-bot-architect patterns; fix handler edge cases if found

requirements.description: Expand watcher and stylometry tests for flag path and empty-channel edge cases

implement.description: Minimal watcher/stylometry fixes if tests expose bugs

requirements.description: Harden verify rate limit on submit and JSON access logging; security-review any changes

test.description: Add submit 429 test and LOG_JSON caplog test to rate_limit and request_logging tests

implement.description: Fix gaps found; run security-review subagent on diff

requirements.description: Implement top research backlog item (highest severity, smallest diff) with TDD

test.description: Add test for chosen improvement in appropriate test module

implement.description: Pick item from research.md; red-green-refactor; log in improvement-log.md

requirements.description: Final report, lessons update, and full verify suite

test.description: Add test asserting IMPROVE_REPORT.md mentions verify.ps1 and requirement count

implement.description: Write IMPROVE_REPORT.md; update tasks/lessons.md if fixes landed
